description: Fix 3 deployment issues preventing tenant provisioning from working

userStories.title: Fix deployment issues: bind-mount paths, container IP resolution, reconciliation, entrypoint, and provisioning flow
userStories.description: As the system, I want tenant provisioning to work end-to-end so containers start, become ACTIVE, and receive messages.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-run-options.ts: container bind-mount paths are /home/agent/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json and /home/agent/.claude/.credentials.json (not /root/ or /run/secrets/)
app-factory.ts provisioning: after creating tenant dirs, chmod 777 them so agent user (uid 1001) can write
app-factory.ts provisioning: seeds openclaw.json config into dataDir/home/.openclaw/openclaw.json with gateway.mode=local, gateway.bind=any
app-factory.ts provisioning: creates dataDir/home/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/ and dataDir/home/.claude/ directories
health-poll.ts: resolves container IP via docker inspect instead of using container name as hostname (host cannot resolve Docker container names)
app-factory.ts message forwarding: resolves container IP via docker inspect instead of using container name
startup-reconciliation.ts: before marking STARTING tenants FAILED, checks if their container is running via docker inspect; if running, leaves status as STARTING
index.ts: after reconciliation, resumes health polling for any tenants still in STARTING status
entrypoint.sh: auth check paths are /home/agent/.openclaw/... and /home/agent/.claude/... (not /root/ or /run/secrets/)
entrypoint.sh: gateway command is exec openclaw gateway (foreground mode, not openclaw gateway start)
pnpm build succeeds after all source changes
bash scripts/validate-deployment.sh passes sections 1-3 (services, config, Docker container smoke test)
userStories.notes: Fix TypeScript SOURCE files only (not dist/). Rebuild with pnpm build after changes.
